# OtherAgentDemo

Adapter-agnostic project scaffolding produced by a hypothetical non-equipa
agent runtime. This file mirrors what an `ASSISTANT.md` (or
`AGENT.md`) might contain on a runtime whose primary persona file is
not named after a specific vendor.

The importer must accept this archive even though there is no
`prompts/` subdirectory and no vendor-specific persona file.
